response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java-focused project work, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and is significantly overqualified for an entry-level role, raising concerns about retention and fit within junior team structures.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and developer tooling projects
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
No demonstrated Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level background suggests misalignment with entry-level role expectations
